title: Trump’s surgeon general nominee weaves through contentious Senate hearing
author: Joseph Choi
fullText: Click in for more news from The Hill {beacon} Health Care   The Big Story  Trump’s surgeon general nominee weaves through contentious Senate hearing  Casey Means, President Trump’s second nominee to be U.S. surgeon general, finally appeared before the Senate for her confirmation hearing more than half a year after she was nominated. Her highly…
